name: Spark_Math.Fixed

documentation.description:
Helper function: Fixed-point "/" returns universal_fixed, need wrapper
Precondition ensures no division by zero.
Note: Fixed-point division can overflow if |Left/Right| exceeds type range.

subprograms.name: Divide
subprograms.code: function Divide (Left, Right : Fixed_Type) return Fixed_Type

subprograms.name: Max
subprograms.code: function Max (A, B : Fixed_Type) return Fixed_Type

subprograms.name: Min
subprograms.code: function Min (A, B : Fixed_Type) return Fixed_Type

subprograms.name: Sqrt
subprograms.code: function Sqrt (N : Fixed_Type; Max_Iterations : Natural := 1_000) return Fixed_Type
